---
title: "Week 2 Problem Set"
author: "Your Name Here!"
date: "Date goes Here!"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r header2}
#####################################################
## title: Week 2 Problem Set!
## author: Lindsey Devir
## purpose: to try out R
## date: 4/12/26
#####################################################

# you can start coding below

```


1. [Text answer for question 1 here]

```{r q1, echo = TRUE}

# write code for question 1 here!

```


2. [Text answer for question 2 here]

```{r q2, echo = TRUE}

# write code for question 2 here!

```

3. [Text answer for question 3 here]

```{r q3, echo = TRUE}

# write code for question 3 here!

```

4. [Text answer for question 4 here]

```{r q4, echo = TRUE}

# write code for question 4 here!

```

5. [Text answer for question 5 here]

```{r q5, echo = TRUE}

# write code for question 5 here!

```
